fields.summary: KOPQR8901J - Two SIPs skipped Axis ELSS fund
fields.description: Investor asking why SIP skipped for 2 months in a row.

analysis.summary: KOPQR8901J - Two SIPs skipped Axis ELSS fund
analysis.description: Investor asking why SIP skipped for 2 months in a row.

comments.body: Event logs showed sip_submission_skipped for both months. check_sip_pause_status confirmed pause was set by ops team. SIP retriggered successfully after customer confirmed resumption.
comments.author: support-agent@fundsindia.com
